nasb.text: Now these are those who conspired against him: Zabad the son of Shimeath the Ammonitess, and Jehozabad the son of Shimrith the Moabitess.

esv.text: Those who conspired against him were Zabad the son of Shimeath the Ammonite, and Jehozabad the son of Shimrith the Moabite.

cnv.text: 謀害他的是亞捫婦人示米押的兒子撒拔和摩押婦人示米利的兒子約薩拔。

ccb.text: 杀他的是亚扪妇人示米押的儿子撒拔和摩押妇人示米利的儿子约萨拔。
